user.title: PIK Comfort Meters
user.description: Enter your PIK Comfort account credentials.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check phone and password.
error.no_accounts: No meters found for this account.

data.password: New password (leave empty to keep current)

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check phone and password.

abort.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check phone and password.
abort.no_accounts: No meters found for this account.

submit_reading.name: Submit Meter Reading
submit_reading.description: Submits readings for all tariffs of the meter (device). If readings are not provided, current sensor values are used.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The meter device to submit readings for.

readings.name: Readings
readings.description: Meter readings to submit. Can be a single number (for single-tariff meters) or a list of numbers (for multi-tariff meters, in order: tariff 1, tariff 2, tariff 3). If not provided, current sensor values are used.
